Title: User registration and login
Preconditions: User has not registered before
Test Data: Valid email, password, name, and surname
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Tap on the "Register" button
3. Enter the required information (email, password, name, and surname)
4. Tap on the "Register" button again
5. Verify that the user is registered and can log in with the provided credentials
Expected Result: The user is able to register and log in successfully

Title: Carbon footprint calculation
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Tap on the "Carbon Footprint" tab
3. Enter the user's activities data (e.g. transportation, food, energy consumption)
4. Tap on the "Calculate" button
5. Verify that the carbon footprint is calculated correctly
Expected Result: The carbon footprint is calculated correctly based on the user's activities data

Title: Suggestions for reducing carbon footprint
Preconditions: User has calculated their carbon footprint
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Tap on the "Carbon Footprint" tab
3. Verify that suggestions for reducing carbon footprint are displayed based on the user's carbon footprint
Expected Result: The suggestions for reducing carbon footprint are displayed correctly based on the user's carbon footprint

Title: Social features to share carbon footprint reduction achievements with friends
Preconditions: User has reduced their carbon footprint and has friends in the application
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Tap on the "Social" tab
3. Verify that the user's carbon footprint reduction achievements are displayed
4. Tap on the "Share" button
5. Verify that the user can share their carbon footprint reduction achievements with their friends
Expected Result: The user can share their carbon footprint reduction achievements with their friends successfully

Title: User Registration
Preconditions: The Android app is installed on the device.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the app.
2. The user is prompted to create an account.
3. The user enters the required details (username, password, email) in the registration form.
Expected Result: The user is notified of successful registration and is redirected to the Home page.

Title: User Login
Preconditions: The user has the app installed and has an account.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the app.
2. The user is prompted to enter login credentials.
3. The user enters the username and password of their account.
Expected Result: The user is authenticated and is redirected to the main application page.

Title: Verify the display of the carbon footprint calculation
Preconditions: User has logged in and selected a device
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the carbon footprint calculation page
2. Select a replacement option (component or device)
3. Observe the carbon footprint calculation result
Expected Result: The carbon footprint calculation result is displayed correctly

Title: Verify the display of device hardware information
Preconditions: User has logged in and selected a device
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the device information page
2. Observe the device's hardware information (memory, battery status, model)
Expected Result: The device's hardware information is displayed correctly

Title: Verify the display of the device's carbon footprint history
Preconditions: User has logged in and selected a device
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the carbon footprint history page
2. Observe the carbon footprint history of the selected device
Expected Result: The carbon footprint history of the selected device is displayed correctly

Title: Verify the deletion of user data upon account deletion
Preconditions: User has requested account deletion
Test Steps:
1. Request account deletion
2. Observe the deletion of the user's account and data from the database
Expected Result: The user's account and data are deleted from the database

Title: Verify the deletion of user data upon application uninstallation
Preconditions: User has uninstalled the application
Test Steps:
1. Uninstall the application
2. Observe the deletion of the user's data from the device
Expected Result: The user's data is deleted from the device

Title: Verify the elimination of sensitive user data
Preconditions: User has requested account deletion
Test Steps:
1. Request account deletion
2. Observe the elimination of sensitive user data from the database
Expected Result: Sensitive user data is eliminated from the database

Title: Verify the scanning of device hardware
Preconditions: User has logged in and selected a device
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the device information page
2. Observe the scanning and display of the device's hardware information (memory, battery status, model)
Expected Result: The device's hardware information is correctly scanned and displayed

Title: Response Time for Data Retrieval and Database Access
Preconditions: The application is running and connected to the internet.
Test Steps:
1. Retrieve data from the database.
2. Measure the time taken for the data retrieval operation.
Expected Result: The time taken for the data retrieval operation should be less than 100 milliseconds.

Title: User Interface Simplicity and Intuitiveness
Preconditions: The application is running and the user interface is visible.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate through the user interface.
2. Observe the size and placement of the user interface elements.
3. Check if the user interface uses stylized images to represent actions.
Expected Result: The user interface should be easy to navigate and intuitive.

Title: Database Protection from SQL Injection
Preconditions: The application is running and connected to the database.
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to perform an SQL injection attack on the database.
2. Observe if the attack is successfully blocked.
Expected Result: The SQL injection attack should be blocked, ensuring the protection of sensitive data in the database.

Title: Compliance with European and Italian Data Protection Laws
Preconditions: The application is running and handling user data.
Test Steps:
1. Collect user data within the application.
2. Ensure that the data is handled according to European and Italian data protection laws.
Expected Result: The application should use user data in compliance with European and Italian data protection laws.

Title: Internet Connection for Data Communication
Preconditions: The application is running and connected to the internet.
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to send and receive data to and from the internet.
Expected Result: The application should be able to send and receive data to and from the internet.

Title: Ethical Use of Calculated and Provided Data
Preconditions: The application is running and providing data to the user.
Test Steps: 1. Observe the use of calculated and provided data within the application.
Expected Result: The data should not be used for profit-making purposes, as the developers aim to sensitize users about their ecological impact.

Title: User can create an account
Preconditions: The application must be downloaded from the store
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Navigate to the account creation screen
3. Enter the required information
4. Submit the form
Expected Result: The user is redirected to the login page and their data is saved in the database

Title: User can log in
Preconditions: The application must be downloaded from the store
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Navigate to the login screen
3. Enter the user credentials
4. Submit the form
Expected Result: The user is logged in and can access the application

Title: User can modify account information
Preconditions: The user must have created an account
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application
2. Navigate to the account settings screen
3. Edit the user information
4. Submit the form
Expected Result: The user information is updated

Title: User can log out
Preconditions: The user must be logged in
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application
2. Navigate to any screen in the application
3. Log out of the application
Expected Result: The user is no longer logged in and cannot access the application

Title: User can delete account
Preconditions: The user must have created an account
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application
2. Navigate to the account settings screen
3. Select the option to delete the account
4. Confirm the deletion
Expected Result: The user no longer has a personal account and is redirected to the login page, their data is deleted from the database

Title: User can view hardware specifications of their device
